overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a Medjay character walking through ancient Egyptian desert landscapes. The clip begins at sunset with the Great Pyramid visible in the distance, features an encounter with a group of riders, and transitions abruptly to a nighttime scene with palm groves.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert oasis edge with scattered palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the desert sand toward the distant pyramid

entered.detail: cluster of tall palm trees with green fronds lining the left side of the path
large stone pyramid visible in the distant haze against the sunset sky
rolling sand dunes stretching to the horizon on the right

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a desert oasis landscape at golden hour sunset, with palm trees on the left and the Great Pyramid visible in the distant haze ahead. The sand shows vehicle tracks and footprints as the character moves steadily forward.

events.description: group of riders on horses becomes visible ahead on the desert path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the group of riders ahead on the desert path

notable_agents.action: group of riders on horses and camels approaching from the distance toward the character

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking toward a group of riders approaching on the desert path. The palm trees pass closer on the left while the riders grow from distant specks to recognizable figures against the warm sunset sky.

events.description: character passes by the group of riders on the path

agents.ego_description: passing by the group of riders on the desert path

notable_agents.action: group of riders on horses and camels passing by the character on either side of the path

entered.detail: large leafy tree providing shade on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes the group of riders on the desert path, with a large tree providing shade on the left. The pyramid disappears from view as the character moves past the mounted caravan in the warm sunset light.

events.description: scene transitions abruptly from sunset to nighttime with dark blue moonlight

agents.ego_description: walking through the desert landscape under moonlight, approaching distant vegetation

entered.detail: dense cluster of palm trees visible in the moonlight ahead on the path
dark blue night sky with clouds illuminated by moonlight

segments.scene_description: The scene cuts to nighttime with the character walking through a darker desert landscape illuminated by blue moonlight. The character approaches a distant palm grove with dense vegetation visible on the right side of the sandy path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a desert landscape that transforms from a golden sunset oasis into a moonlit nocturnal wilderness. It begins with the character walking past palm trees toward the Great Pyramid shimmering in the distant haze, moving across sand marked by tracks and footprints. As the character advances, the camera tracks toward a group of riders who grow from distant specks into recognizable figures against the warm sky. The scene then shifts as the character passes the mounted caravan under the shade of a large tree, causing the pyramid to disappear from view. Finally, the environment abruptly transitions to a dark desert illuminated by blue moonlight, where the character approaches a dense palm grove on the right side of the sandy path.
